name: QA 1573
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1573

Exercise libpcp_web memory leak without a redis-server.



Copyright (c) 2020 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py fedora34-container reproduce
